mathlib_note: lakefile.toml does NOT require mathlib (stdlib-only). Use stdlib-only tactics.

fv_targets.name: math::constrain
fv_targets.status: 8 theorems proved: constrain_ge_lo, constrain_le_hi, constrain_in_range, constrain_of_mem, constrain_of_lt_lo, constrain_of_gt_hi, constrain_idempotent, constrain_mono. 0 sorry.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction - Int model, NaN not modelled

fv_targets.name: math::signNoZero
fv_targets.status: 6 theorems proved. 0 sorry. WARNING: NaN mismatch found - C++ float version returns 0 for NaN, violating signNoZero_ne_zero safety property for float callers.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction + mismatch for NaN - documented in CORRESPONDENCE.md

fv_targets.name: math::countSetBits
fv_targets.status: 9 concrete examples + countSetBits_pow2 proved by induction. 0 sorry.

fv_targets.name: SlewRate::update
fv_targets.status: 8 theorems proved: slewUpdate_change_ge, slewUpdate_change_le, slewUpdate_reaches_target, slewUpdate_nondecreasing, slewUpdate_nonincreasing, slewUpdate_no_overshoot_up, slewUpdate_no_overshoot_down, slewUpdate_steady_state. 0 sorry.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction - Int model, float/state/dt product not modelled

fv_targets.name: math::deadzone
fv_targets.status: 10 theorems proved: deadzone_in_dz, signR_of_nonneg, signR_of_neg, deadzone_pos_eq, deadzone_neg_eq, deadzone_pos, deadzone_neg, deadzone_no_dz_pos, deadzone_at_max, deadzone_at_min. 2 sorry: deadzone_le_one (negative branch) and deadzone_ge_neg_one (range bounds, need Mathlib linarith).
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction - Rat model, float semantics/NaN not modelled

fv_targets.name: math::interpolate
fv_targets.status: 10 theorems proved: interpolate_clamped_low/high, interpolate_at_low/high, interpolate_const, interpolate_slope_nonneg, interpolate_mono_interior, interpolate_le_high, interpolate_ge_low, interpolate_identity_slope. 0 sorry.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction - Rat model, precondition x_low < x_high explicit

fv_targets.name: matrix::wrap_pi
fv_targets.status: research only. Highest-priority Mathlib target. Needs Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic + Int.fract

fv_targets.name: WelfordMean online mean/variance
fv_targets.status: research only. Inductive recurrence proof needed

fv_targets.name: AlphaFilter::update
fv_targets.status: research only. No-overshoot tractable; convergence needs Mathlib topology. Similar pattern to SlewRate - integer model approach recommended.

fv_targets.name: RingBuffer circular buffer
fv_targets.status: research only. FIFO ordering, index wraparound - omega tractable

open_prs.description: deadzone spec + 10 proofs (2 sorry for range theorems)

bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN inputs; violates safety property signNoZero_ne_zero for float callers
bugs_found.status: documented in CORRESPONDENCE.md and CRITIQUE.md, no issue filed yet - recommend filing

rat_proven_lemmas: Rat.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right: a ≤ b → 0 ≤ c → a*c ≤ b*c
Rat.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left: a ≤ b → 0 ≤ c → c*a ≤ c*b
Rat.add_le_add_right (iff): a + c ≤ b + c ↔ a ≤ b
Rat.add_lt_add_right (iff): a + c < b + c ↔ a < b
Rat.mul_add: a*(b+c) = a*b + a*c (as simp with sub_eq_add_neg, mul_add, mul_neg)
Rat.le_refl: a ≤ a (use as term, not applied)
Rat.le_sub_iff: a ≤ b - c ↔ a + c ≤ b
Rat.lt_irrefl: ¬(a < a) (use as term, not applied to arg)
Std.lt_trans: a < b → b < c → a < c
Std.lt_of_lt_of_le: a < b → b ≤ c → a < c
simp [Rat.sub_eq_add_neg, Rat.mul_add, Rat.mul_neg, Rat.add_comm, Rat.add_left_comm]: equiv to ring for mul_sub patterns
rat_unavailable_lemmas: norm_num (does not work on Rat expressions without Mathlib)
Rat.sub_zero, Rat.div_one, Rat.inv_one (not in core, use manual rewrites)
le_refl with argument (use Rat.le_refl as term)
ha ▸ ... for rewriting in term mode (use rw [ha] at h instead)

tool_recommendations.lean4_stdlib: primary - pure math functions using Int or Rat
tool_recommendations.lean4_mathlib: when network available - wrap_pi, AlphaFilter convergence, Rat linarith/ring
tool_recommendations.cbmc: next recommended - C++ integer overflow, array bounds, interpolateN invariants
tool_recommendations.infer: quick wins - memory safety, null dereference
tool_recommendations.tla_plus: arming FSM, mission FSM - temporal properties
tool_recommendations.gappa: EKF floating-point rounding error, SlewRate float precision

notes: Mathlib REMOVED from lakefile.toml - use stdlib-only tactics (omega, simp, by_cases, Rat.* lemmas)
split_ifs NOT available without Mathlib - use by_cases + simp [hcond]
For if-then-else goals: split, then rename_i to name the new hypothesis
After split isFalse.isFalse: rename_i h1 h2 names BOTH outer and inner False hypothesis
Use rename_i h1 for the outer isFalse, then split again, rename_i h2 for inner
lake build passes for all files (2 sorry in Deadzone for range theorems)
signNoZero NaN bug: C++ returns 0 for NaN, documented in CORRESPONDENCE.md and CRITIQUE.md
interpolate_at_high key proof: use simp [sub_eq_add_neg, mul_add, mul_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm] to rearrange, then Rat.sub_add_cancel
Rat.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left arg order: (hval ≤ hval2) → (0 ≤ c) → (c * hval ≤ c * hval2)
For ha_mul rewriting: use rw [ha_mul] at h; exact h instead of ha_mul ▸ ...
CRITIQUE.md created: honest assessment with proved theorem table, gaps, bug findings
